name: Nictralane
role: Brand Strategy · Logo Redesign · Flyer Design
desc: A fashion brand I worked with needed a brand refresh after a merger. They wanted to maintain a clear, confident and versatile logo which communicated their new identity as well as a flyer design to promote their new face. The redesign had to honour existing brand equity while signalling fresh direction to their market.

The redesign had to honour existing brand equity while signalling fresh direction to their market.

focus: Clarity, confidence, recognizability after a significant brand transition.
